title: Common-Stone
description: A modpack for Aystone V2, providing all tweaks and features you could dream of
body:
A modpack tailored for [**Aystone V2**](https://aystone.fr). Contains all features and tools you might need while playing on the server.

### What to do with this pack ?

With this pack, you can enjoy the server while get a much more easy time with technicalities, including a **minimap** that can be linked to the server map, multiple mods to optimize the game and enable a full customization via resourcepacks, shaders and more. You can also find tools to play with more complex mechanics of the game, most of the binds are described down below.

For more advanced users, all mods are fully configurable in-game to allow you to have the best experience possible.

### Binds

```
X : Zoom
V : Toggle Freecam
S : Sort inventory hovered by mouse
M : Open worldmap
ù : Open worldmap settings
* : Open minimap settings
F7 : Show light levels
Alt + G : Toggle gamma
Right Shift : Open MaLiLib Menu
, : Open Litematica Menu
< : Enable Smart block placement
...And more to come !
```
